exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your professional networking forward
items: Conduct a comprehensive audit of your current professional network and online presence
Create a professional networking goals document with 3 specific objectives for the next 6 months
Research and identify 5 key industry professionals or thought leaders you want to connect with
Update your LinkedIn profile with a compelling headline and summary that clearly communicates your value proposition
Schedule and complete 2 informational interviews with professionals in your target field or role
Define your personal brand by writing a clear 2-sentence professional value proposition
